memes.label: A Drama in the Air
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne short story in which a balloonist ascending from Frankfort is joined by an uninvited madman who casts out all the ballast to soar toward death.'

memes.label: A Winter Amid the Ice
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novella in which an old Dunkirk sailor voyages into the Arctic to rescue his shipwrecked son, wintering amid the ice against treachery and polar bears.'
aliases: A Winter''s Sojourn in the Ice

memes.label: Aberfoyle
memes.description: 'The exhausted Scottish coal-mining district whose old pits open the story of The Underground City.'

memes.label: Adelaide
memes.description: 'The capital of South Australia, a chief town and port on the castaways'' overland crossing of the continent.'

memes.label: Aden
memes.description: 'Red Sea coaling port at the far end of the run from Suez where the Mongolia puts in on Phileas Fogg''s way to Bombay.'

memes.label: Adriatic Sea
memes.description: The arm of the Mediterranean between Italy and the Balkan coast, sounded by the Nautilus and dreaded as a drift-goal by Verne's balloonists.

memes.label: The Adventures of a Special Correspondent
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel following a reporter aboard the Grand Transasiatic railway from the Caspian to Peking, among them a stowaway hidden in a packing case.'

memes.label: Africa
memes.description: 'The great continent of unknown interior that Dr. Ferguson sets out to traverse by balloon from east to west in Five Weeks in a Balloon.'

memes.label: Albatross
memes.description: 'Robur''s heavier-than-air flying machine, lifted by dozens of screws, in Robur the Conqueror.'

memes.label: The Abduction by the Albatross
aliases: The Kidnapping of Prudent and Evans

memes.label: Alcide Jolivet
memes.description: "The witty French war correspondent who reports the Tartar invasion, telegraphing his dispatches to an imaginary cousin."

memes.label: Aleutian Islands
memes.description: 'The real island chain the drifting colonists of The Fur Country hope to reach as their last landfall before the open Pacific.'

memes.label: Alexandria
memes.description: The Egyptian Mediterranean port and mail-route landfall, a stage on the sea roads toward Suez, Aden, and the East in Verne.

memes.label: Algiers
memes.description: The chief city of the North African coast, built amphitheater-wise above its bay, swallowed with the coast when a fragment of earth breaks away.

memes.label: Allahabad
memes.description: 'Indian railway town where the Great Indian Peninsula line resumes, forcing Fogg''s elephant journey across the gap from Kholby.'

memes.label: Alps
memes.description: The great mountain wall of central Europe, giant of the continent crowned by Mont Blanc, a measure against which Verne weighs all other heights.

memes.label: Altamont
memes.description: 'The American captain of the Porpoise in The Adventures of Captain Hatteras, rescued from the ice and drawn into a rivalry with Hatteras over the priority of Arctic discovery.'

memes.label: Altamont Harbour
memes.description: 'The port on the New America coast named for Altamont, the northern base from which Hatteras''s party sails toward the Pole.'

memes.label: Amazon
memes.description: 'Great South American river that carries the jangada eight hundred leagues through Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon.'

memes.label: The Amazon Cryptogram
aliases: The Decipherment of the Innocence Document

relations.label: Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon

memes.label: Province of Amazones
memes.description: 'Great Brazilian province at the mouth of the Rio Negro, capital Manaos, through which the jangada drifts in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon.'

memes.label: Amou-Daria
memes.description: The great Central Asian river, the Oxus of the Ancients, crossed by the Grand Trans-Asian railway in Verne and rival of the Indus and Ganges.

memes.label: Amsterdam Island
memes.description: 'The real Indian Ocean island, a solitary cone on the 37th parallel, weighed and rejected as a refuge by the searchers in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: An Antarctic Mystery
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel, sequel to Poe''s Arthur Gordon Pym, in which the schooner Halbrane sails into the Antarctic to seek the survivors of a lost ship.'
aliases: The Sphinx of the Ice Fields

memes.label: Andes
memes.description: The great mountain chain of South America, the Cordilleras that Glenarvan's party crossed on the 37th parallel in search of Captain Grant.

memes.label: The Andes Earthquake
memes.description: 'While crossing the Cordillera of the Andes, Lord Glenarvan''s search party is caught in an earthquake that hurls them down the mountainside and sweeps young Robert Grant away.'

memes.label: Angola
memes.description: 'Portuguese colony on Africa''s western coast, crossed by slave caravans, where Dick Sand''s party is wrecked in Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen.'

memes.label: Antarctic Sea
memes.description: 'The ice-strewn southern ocean into which the schooner Halbrane sails on her polar quest in An Antarctic Mystery.'

memes.label: Aouda
memes.description: 'The young Parsee widow rescued by Phileas Fogg during his journey across India.'

memes.label: Arabia
memes.description: 'The great peninsula the Nautilus skirts in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea, its Red Sea coasts and ancient canal-lands threaded between Suez and the Persian Gulf.'

memes.label: Aral Sea
memes.description: The shrinking inland sea of Central Asia, drying like the Caspian it was once joined to, crossed in Verne's Trans-Asian rail and airship journeys.

memes.label: Arctic Ocean
memes.description: 'The northern polar ocean whose ice-bound shores frame the expedition of The Fur Country and the voyages of Captain Hatteras.'

memes.label: Argentine
memes.description: 'The South American republic whose plains and Pampas the searchers cross on the thirty-seventh parallel in In Search of the Castaways, from the Cordilleras down to the Atlantic.'

memes.label: Professor Aronnax
memes.description: 'The naturalist narrator of Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas, held captive aboard the Nautilus.'

relations.label: Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas

memes.label: Around the World in Eighty Days
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which Phileas Fogg wagers his fortune that he can circle the globe in eighty days.'

memes.label: Astrakhan
memes.description: The old Russian city at the north end of the Caspian Sea, once styled the Star of the Desert, that lends its name to the astrakhan fur.

memes.label: Atacama
memes.description: 'South American desert between the Andes and the Pacific that Harris falsely claims as the castaways'' route in Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen.'

memes.label: Atlantic Ocean
memes.description: 'The first of the great oceans the 37th parallel crosses in In Search of the Castaways, and the Duncan''s appointed rendezvous.'

memes.label: Auckland
memes.description: 'New Zealand port on the 37th parallel toward which the Macquarie sails, keeping the searchers on Captain Grant''s latitude.'

memes.label: Australia
memes.description: 'Southern continent crossed on the 37th parallel by Glenarvan''s party in the second phase of the search for Captain Grant.'

memes.label: Austria
memes.description: The Central European empire, a great power in the diplomacy and history that shape Verne's world.

memes.label: Axel
memes.description: 'The young nephew who narrates the descent to the centre of the earth.'

relations.label: Journey to the Center of the Earth

memes.label: Ayrton
memes.description: 'A repentant traitor, once quartermaster of the Britannia, redeemed as the sixth colonist of Lincoln Island.'

memes.label: Back Cup
memes.description: 'A hollow volcanic islet in the Bermudas that serves as the secret lair of the pirate Ker Karraje in Facing the Flag.'

memes.label: Baffin Bay
memes.description: 'The ice-filled Arctic sea between Greenland and Baffin Island, the first great barrier crossed by the Forward in The Adventures of Captain Hatteras.'

memes.label: Baffins Bay
memes.description: The great Arctic sea on the west of Greenland, a haunt of whalers and the mouth of the long suite of straits leading toward the North-West Passage.

memes.label: Baku
memes.description: The Caspian oil-port of the Guebres, eastern terminus of the Transcaucasian railway where the reporter embarks across Asia.

memes.label: Baltimore
memes.description: 'The Maryland city where the Gun Club is established in From the Earth to the Moon.'

relations.label: From the Earth to the Moon

memes.label: Baraba
memes.description: 'A vast swampy steppe district of Western Siberia between the Obi and the Irtych, dreaded for its marshes and insects in Michael Strogoff.'

memes.label: Impey Barbicane
memes.description: 'The resolute president of the Gun Club who launches the projectile to the Moon.'

relations.label: From the Earth to the Moon

memes.label: Barrow Strait
memes.description: 'The real Arctic strait beyond Lancaster Strait, the well-trodden approach to Beechey Island that the Forward follows and later flees back through.'

memes.label: Bay of Bengal
memes.description: 'The great bay of the Indian Ocean crossed by the Nautilus, named among the world''s pearl fisheries.'

memes.label: Bay of Talcahuano
memes.description: 'The Chilean estuary where the yacht Duncan begins and ends her search for Captain Grant along the thirty-seventh parallel in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Beechey Island
memes.description: 'The real Arctic island and rendezvous of polar expeditions in The Adventures of Captain Hatteras, where Hatteras counts on renewing the Forward''s coal.'

memes.label: Behring Sea
memes.description: 'The real northern sea into which the drifting Victoria Island is carried in The Fur Country, scattered with the islands that offer the colonists their last hope of rescue.'

memes.label: Behring Strait
memes.description: 'The real strait between Asia and America toward which the drifting ice-island is carried in The Fur Country, the colony''s dreaded destination and hoped-for lifeline.'

memes.label: Belem
memes.description: 'The Brazilian city at the mouth of the Amazon, terminus of the jangada voyage in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon.'

memes.label: Belgium
memes.description: The small but generous Western European kingdom, a land of grottoes and railways threaded through Verne's Continental journeys.

memes.label: Bell
memes.description: 'The carpenter of the brig Forward in The Adventures of Captain Hatteras, a steadfast craftsman and one of the four men chosen for Hatteras''s overland dash toward the Pole.'

memes.label: Bellot Strait
memes.description: 'The real narrow Arctic strait on which Hatteras stakes his voyage, the only southern outlet from the Gulf of Boothia.'

memes.label: Ben Zoof
memes.description: "Captain Servadac's devoted Montmartre-born orderly, whose loyalty follows his master from Algeria into the cometary voyage of Gallia."

memes.label: Benares
memes.description: 'Sacred city on the Ganges and Sir Francis Cromarty''s destination on Phileas Fogg''s railway crossing of India.'

memes.label: Bennet Islet
memes.description: 'A small, barren island of the far southern seas in An Antarctic Mystery, a landfall on the Halbrane''s search for the men of the Jane.'

memes.label: Bergen
memes.description: 'The Norwegian west-coast port and fishing home of Ole Kamp, whose ship the Viking sails from it in Ticket No. 9672.'

memes.label: Berlin
memes.description: The German capital, a seat of learning and diplomacy repeatedly invoked in Verne's global affairs.

memes.label: Bihe
memes.description: 'A slave-trade market town of the Benguela interior, one of the trader Alvez''s factories in Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen.'

memes.label: Black Rock Creek
memes.description: 'The wild creek on the shore of Lake Erie that serves as a hiding place for Robur''s machine the Terror in The Master of the World.'

memes.label: Black Sea
memes.description: 'Great inland sea between Europe and Asia Minor, recurring across Verne''s works as a landing point and a fixed name of geography and trade.'

memes.label: Blue Ridge Mountains
memes.description: 'The Appalachian range whose peak the Great Eyrie touches off the mystery of The Master of the World.'

memes.label: Bokhara
memes.description: The ancient Central Asian city and khanate, the "Rome of Islam," a great oasis station on the Grand Transasiatic railway.

memes.label: Bolivia
memes.description: 'The South American land that the traitor Harris pretends the shipwrecked survivors have reached in Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen, when in truth they stand on Angola.'

memes.label: Bombay
memes.description: 'Indian port where Phileas Fogg lands and boards the railway across the subcontinent.'

memes.label: Bordeaux
memes.description: The French Atlantic port on the Gironde, a departure point and landfall for Verne's globe-trotters and aeronauts.

memes.label: Boston
memes.description: 'The New England seaport off which a mysterious craft is sighted in Master of the World, and home city of several of Verne''s American characters.'

memes.label: Brazil
memes.description: 'The great South American empire whose provinces the Amazon waters, home of the Garral family in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon.'

memes.label: Brest
memes.description: The great French naval port on the Atlantic, the Alaska's landfall in her rescue voyage and a cradle of Verne's sea expeditions.

memes.label: Buffalo
memes.description: 'The New York port at the eastern end of Lake Erie, past which the Terror races toward Niagara in The Master of the World.'

memes.label: Calais
memes.description: The French Channel port facing Dover, a crossing point for Verne's globe-trotters and pioneering aeronauts.

memes.label: Calcutta
memes.description: 'Bengal capital and eastern terminus of Phileas Fogg''s railway crossing of India.'

memes.label: California
memes.description: 'The Pacific-coast American state, capital San Francisco, from which Godfrey Morgan sets out to sea in Godfrey Morgan.'

memes.label: Callao
memes.description: 'The Pacific seaport of Lima in Peru, a setting in The Pearl of Lima and the last recorded port of the Britannia in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Cambridge Observatory
memes.description: 'The Massachusetts observatory whose director answers the Gun Club''s astronomical questions about reaching the Moon.'

memes.label: Canada
memes.description: 'The northern fur-trade dominion, once French then British, that forms the base of the Hudson Bay expedition in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: Canadian General Transportation Company
memes.description: 'The defunct Canadian shipping firm that owned the lost steamer Cynthia, at the heart of Erik''s search for his origins.'

memes.label: Cape Bathurst
memes.description: 'An Arctic promontory north of the seventieth parallel where Lieutenant Hobson founds Fort Hope in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: Cape Bernouilli
memes.description: 'The cape on the South Australian coast where the 37th parallel meets the continent, the starting point of the Duncan party''s overland crossing in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Cape Bon
memes.description: 'Northernmost promontory of Africa and nearest point to Sicily, prominent in the reshaped Mediterranean of Off on a Comet.'

memes.label: Cape Corrientes
memes.description: 'The cape on the Argentine coast where the Duncan cruises and rides out a storm in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Cape Esquimaux
memes.description: 'The fictional headland on the drifting peninsula of Cape Bathurst in The Fur Country, worn away by the sea as the ice-island melts.'

memes.label: Cape Farewell
memes.description: 'The real southern cape of Greenland, the Forward''s first great landmark on its secret course toward the Pole.'

memes.label: Cape Horn
memes.description: 'The rock at the southern tip of South America, doubled by ships rounding between the Atlantic and Pacific in several of the Voyages.'

memes.label: Cape Michael
memes.description: 'The fictional headland on the drifting peninsula of Cape Bathurst in The Fur Country, eastern limit of the colony and the point where the settlers quit the doomed island.'

memes.label: Cape of Good Hope
memes.description: 'The southern cape of Africa, one of the great capes the Nautilus must double on its course between the Indian Ocean and the Atlantic in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea.'

memes.label: Cape Saknussemm
memes.description: 'The cape on the shore of the subterranean Lidenbrock Sea, named for Arne Saknussemm, from which the explorers are swept north in A Journey to the Center of the Earth.'

memes.label: Cape Tchelynskin
memes.description: 'The northernmost cape of the Eurasian mainland, the great obstacle the Alaska must double on her polar voyage in The Waif of the Cynthia.'

memes.label: Cape Verde
memes.description: 'The volcanic archipelago off West Africa, a waypoint on the Duncan''s voyage and, for Captain Nemo, a surviving peak of drowned Atlantis.'

memes.label: Cape Washington
memes.description: 'A headland on the coast of New America named by Altamont, marking the route between the sea and Fort Providence in The Adventures of Captain Hatteras.'

memes.label: Captain Grant
memes.description: "The shipwrecked Scottish captain of the Britannia whose message in a bottle launches the search across the 37th parallel."

memes.label: Captain Hatteras
memes.description: 'The obsessive English captain driven to plant his flag at the North Pole.'

memes.label: Captain Hull
memes.description: "The skilled and humane whaling master of the Pilgrim, entrusted with the schooner by James Weldon, who takes the castaways aboard and perishes with his boat's crew hunting a rogue whale."

memes.label: Captain Nemo
memes.description: 'The enigmatic commander of the Nautilus who has renounced human society.'

relations.label: Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea

memes.label: Captain Nicholl
memes.description: "The obsessive armour-plate forger and inveterate rival of Barbicane, whose lifelong feud over shot versus shield ends in reconciliation and a shared voyage to the moon."

memes.label: Captain Spade
memes.description: "The cold, deferential commander of the schooner Ebba and Ker Karraje's henchman, who leads the raid that abducts Thomas Roch and his warder from Healthful House."

memes.label: Carefinotu
memes.description: "The devoted black companion who serves Godfrey as a Man Friday on the desert island, only to be revealed at the climax as the loyal servant Jup Brass playing a part."

memes.label: Caribbean Sea
memes.description: 'The clear tropical sea whose transparent depths and teeming life the Nautilus explores in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea.'

memes.label: Carmen
memes.description: 'A colonial town of Patagonia at the mouth of the Rio Negro, terminus of the Carmen-to-Mendoza route in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Caspian Sea
memes.description: 'The great inland sea of Central Asia whose eastern port of Uzun Ada begins the trans-Asian railway journey in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent.'

memes.label: Cassange
memes.description: 'A slave-trade market town of the Benguela interior, one of the trader Alvez''s factories in Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen.'

memes.label: Caterna
memes.description: "A jovial French comic actor and former sailor crossing Asia with his wife aboard the Grand Transasiatic, whose songs, monologues and nautical wit enliven the narrator's journey."

memes.label: Caucasus
memes.description: The mountain barrier between European Russia and Transcaucasia, crossed by Verne's couriers and correspondents.

memes.label: Ceuta
memes.description: 'Fortified point on the Moroccan coast opposite Gibraltar, carried off by the comet Gallia in Off on a Comet.'

memes.label: Ceylon
memes.description: 'The pearl-fishery island off the Indian peninsula where the Nautilus takes Aronnax to the oyster banks in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea.'

memes.label: The Burning of the Chancellor
memes.description: 'A cargo of cotton smouldering deep in the hold of the Chancellor breaks into an unquenchable fire, dooming the ship and driving her people toward their long ordeal at sea.'

memes.label: Charleston
memes.description: 'The South Carolina port besieged and blockaded in the Civil War, the destination of the daring blockade runners.'

memes.label: The Running of the Charleston Blockade
aliases: The Forcing of the Charleston Blockade

memes.label: Chatham Islands
memes.description: 'The remote South Pacific island group where the Albatross anchors and its captive passengers attempt escape in Robur the Conqueror.'

memes.label: Chicago
memes.description: 'The great American railway city on Lake Michigan, a key waypoint on Phileas Fogg''s homeward journey in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

memes.label: Chili
memes.description: 'The western South American republic (Verne''s spelling of Chile) where Glenarvan''s overland search across the Cordilleras and Pampas begins in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: China
memes.description: 'The eastern terminus of the Grand Transasiatic railway, destination of the reporter Bombarnac in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent.'

memes.label: Christiania
memes.description: 'The Norwegian capital (today Oslo) whose professor Sylvius Hogg befriends the Hansen family in Ticket No. 9672.'

memes.label: The Christiania Lottery Drawing
aliases: The Drawing of the Great Lottery

memes.label: Christmas Harbour
memes.description: 'The real Kerguelen harbour where An Antarctic Mystery opens, home of the Green Cormorant inn and the mooring of the schooner Halbrane.'

memes.label: Claudius Bombarnac
memes.description: "The French reporter of Bordeaux, special correspondent of the Twentieth Century, whose first-person account chronicles the journey across the Grand Transasiatic Railway from the Caspian to China."

memes.label: Claw Cape
memes.description: 'The fictional yataghan-shaped headland at the southeastern extremity of Lincoln Island in The Mysterious Island, named by Neb during the settlers'' survey.'

memes.label: Dr Clawbonny
memes.description: 'The learned, good-humoured ship''s doctor of the brig Forward in The Adventures of Captain Hatteras, an encyclopaedic companion to Hatteras''s voyage toward the North Pole.'

memes.label: Coal Town
memes.description: 'The subterranean mining village lit by electricity beneath Loch Katrine, home of the New Aberfoyle miners in The Underground City.'

memes.label: Coanza
memes.description: 'One of the rivers of Angola, artery of the Benguela slave country in Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen.'

memes.label: Colombia
memes.description: 'The northern South American republic that disputes the Amazon''s paternity in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon, its coasts and caverns recurring across Verne''s works.'

memes.label: Columbiad
memes.description: 'The 900-foot cast-iron cannon built by the Baltimore Gun Club to fire a manned projectile to the Moon in Jules Verne''s From the Earth to the Moon.'

memes.label: The Columbiad Launch
memes.description: 'The firing of the Columbiad cannon that hurls the projectile toward the Moon.'

relations.label: From the Earth to the Moon

memes.label: The Comet's Collision
memes.description: 'A wandering comet grazes the Earth on New Year''s night, tearing away a fragment of the globe that carries a band of survivors into space as the new world Gallia.'

memes.label: Concepcion
memes.description: 'An old city of Chile near the Pacific coast, the landfall from which the 37th-parallel search begins in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: The Condor Abduction
memes.description: 'After the Andes earthquake a giant condor seizes the seemingly lifeless Robert Grant and bears him aloft, until a marksman''s shot brings the bird down and the boy is recovered alive.'

memes.label: Congo
memes.description: 'The great West African river at whose mouth the castaways of Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen come ashore, later proven to be the lower course of the Loualaba.'

memes.label: Connecticut
memes.description: 'New England state, home of Jeorling, the narrator of An Antarctic Mystery.'

memes.label: Conseil
memes.description: 'The devoted, classification-obsessed manservant of Professor Aronnax aboard the Nautilus.'

memes.label: Constantinople
memes.description: The historic Ottoman capital on the Bosphorus, a byword in Verne for siege artillery and daring aeronauts.

memes.label: Copenhagen
memes.description: The Danish capital and seat of northern learning from which the professor sets out for Iceland and the descent into the earth.

memes.label: Coppermine River
memes.description: 'A large river of Arctic North America flowing north into Coronation Gulf, a landmark of the expedition in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: Coronation Gulf
memes.description: 'The Arctic estuary of the North American coast that the fur-hunting expedition skirts in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: The Corral
memes.description: 'The livestock enclosure near the Red Creek on Lincoln Island, later Ayrton''s dwelling.'

memes.label: Corsica
memes.description: The mountainous Mediterranean island of granite and sea-caves, a familiar measure of size and place in Verne's seas.

memes.label: Cousin Benedict
memes.description: 'The absent-minded entomologist relative of Mrs. Weldon aboard the Pilgrim, whose single-minded passion for insects unwittingly betrays the castaways location in Africa.'

memes.label: Creek Glycerine
memes.description: 'The small artificial stream cut by the colonists of Lincoln Island to drain Lake Grant, guarding the approach to Prospect Heights.'

memes.label: Crespo Island
memes.description: 'A Pacific islet whose submerged forests serve as Captain Nemo''s undersea hunting ground in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas.'

memes.label: Crete
memes.description: The great Mediterranean island, also called Candia, in rebellion against the Ottoman Empire as the Nautilus passed its waters.

memes.label: Cyrus Harding
memes.description: 'The resourceful engineer who leads the castaways of Lincoln Island.'

memes.label: The Gained Day
memes.description: 'Fogg discovers he has unknowingly gained a day by travelling eastward, and has won the wager.'

relations.label: Around the World in Eighty Days

memes.label: Davis Strait
memes.description: 'The strait between Greenland and Baffin Island through which the Forward passes to reach Baffin Bay in The Adventures of Captain Hatteras.'

memes.label: The Death of Martin Paz
aliases: The Rescue at the Madeira Cataract

memes.label: The Death of Master Zacharius
aliases: The Bursting of the Last Clock

memes.label: Denmark
memes.description: 'One of the six polar powers of Topsy-Turvy, whose Arctic possessions and Copenhagen approaches recur across Verne''s voyages.'

memes.label: Detroit River
memes.description: 'The strait between Lake Erie and Lake Huron by which the Terror flees its pursuers in The Master of the World.'

memes.label: Dick Kennedy
memes.description: "A Scottish sportsman and Samuel Ferguson's devoted friend, who reluctantly joins the balloon crossing of Africa as the expedition's crack marksman."

memes.label: Dick Sand
memes.description: 'A fifteen-year-old apprentice who takes command of the Pilgrim after its captain is lost.'

relations.label: Dick Sand, A Captain at Fifteen

memes.label: 'Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen'
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which a fifteen-year-old novice must command a schooner after its crew is lost, only to be steered by treachery onto the African coast.'

memes.label: Dirk Peters
memes.description: "The half-breed sailing-master, once Arthur Pym's devoted companion, who ships aboard the Halbrane under the name Hunt and guides it toward the Antarctic mystery."

memes.label: The Disintegration of Victoria Island
aliases: The End of the Ice Island

memes.label: Rouquayrol Diving Apparatus
memes.description: 'The self-contained diving suit and air tank used by Captain Nemo''s crew for untethered underwater walks in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea.'

memes.label: Doctor Clawbonny
memes.description: "The genial and encyclopaedic naturalist of the Forward, whose learning, courage, and unfailing good humour sustain Captain Hatteras's expedition to the North Pole."

memes.label: Doctor Ox's Experiment
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne satirical novella in which a scientist secretly floods a placid Flemish town with pure oxygen to see what excitement it will breed.'

memes.label: Douchak
memes.description: 'A station on the Transcaspian section of the Grand Transasiatic railway, reached at the six-hundred-and-sixtieth verst in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent.'

memes.label: The Drawing of Lots on the Raft
Dream Bay
memes.description: 'The large bight on Godfrey Morgan''s castaway island, named by Godfrey himself, where the mysterious chest washes ashore.'

memes.label: Dublin
memes.description: The Irish capital, a relay on the transatlantic mail route where Fogg's party raced from Queenstown toward Liverpool.

memes.label: East India Company
memes.description: 'The once all-powerful trading company that ruled British India before its possessions passed to the Crown.'

memes.label: Easter Island
memes.description: 'The isolated Pacific island whose sighting lets young Dick Sand fix the Pilgrim''s position during the storm in Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen.'

memes.label: Ecuador
memes.description: 'The equatorial South American republic whose frontier the Amazon defines in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon, one of the rival claimants to the great river''s source.'

memes.label: Edinburgh
memes.description: The Scottish capital, Auld Reekie of the Firth of Forth, a seat of learned societies and home to Verne's Scottish engineers and sportsmen.

memes.label: Ega
memes.description: 'Amazonian town on a lakeside off the great river where the jangada halts in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon.'

memes.label: Egypt
memes.description: 'The land of the Nile and the Red Sea canal whose coast the Nautilus skirts on its passage from Arabia in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea.'

memes.label: Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which a family floats down the Amazon by giant raft while a coded confession holds the key to the father''s innocence.'

memes.label: The Eighty-Day Wager
memes.description: 'Phileas Fogg''s bet at the Reform Club to circle the globe in eighty days.'

relations.label: Around the World in Eighty Days

memes.label: Ekaterenburg
memes.description: 'Russian town on the Siberian side of the Urals, the first great relay east of the mountains in Michael Strogoff.'

memes.label: Elbe
memes.description: The north-German river on whose banks Hamburg stands, walked by Axel in Verne and counted among the great rivers that feed the ocean.

memes.label: Engineer Serko
memes.description: "The clever and resolute engineer who designs Ker Karraje's submarine and, with mocking good humour, schemes to wring the secret of the fulgurator from Thomas Roch."

memes.label: Ephrinell
memes.description: "A brisk American commercial traveller in artificial teeth aboard the Grand Transasiatic, whose coolly commercial courtship of Miss Horatia Bluett ripens into a marriage of pure calculation."

memes.label: Erik
memes.description: "The gifted Norwegian foundling, raised by the Hersebom fishermen of Noroe, who was rescued as an infant tied to a buoy of the wrecked Cynthia and at last found to be the lost grandson of Mr. Durrien."

memes.label: Etna
memes.description: The great volcano of Sicily, fiery landmark of Verne's Mediterranean and his recurring measure of eruptive power.

memes.label: Facing the Flag
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which pirates abduct the inventor of a super-weapon, whose patriotism at last turns his own fulgurator against them.'

memes.label: The Failing of the Zacharius Clocks
Falkland Islands
memes.description: 'The South-Atlantic archipelago that serves as the Halbrane''s last civilized port before her Antarctic voyage in An Antarctic Mystery.'

memes.label: Falls River
memes.description: 'A stream on the southern coast of Lincoln Island, running through the wooded Serpentine Peninsula in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: Far West
memes.description: 'The great western forest of Lincoln Island covering the Serpentine Peninsula in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: Faroe Islands
memes.description: 'The North-Atlantic archipelago off Norway where the Cynthia was wrecked, the disaster that opens The Waif of the Cynthia.'

memes.label: Faruskiar
memes.description: "The superb Mongol grandee and railway general manager whose lordly bearing masks the bandit chief who wrecks the Grand Transasiatic to seize the imperial treasure."

memes.label: Feofar-Khan
memes.description: "The fierce Emir of Bukhara and nominal leader of the Tartar invasion, who condemns Michael Strogoff to be blinded."

memes.label: The Finding of Louis Cornbutte
aliases: The Finding of the Jeune-Hardie Castaways

memes.label: Firth of Clyde
memes.description: 'The sea inlet on the west coast of Scotland where the yacht Duncan is trialled, appearing across In Search of the Castaways and The Underground City.'

memes.label: Five Weeks in a Balloon
memes.description: 'Jules Verne''s debut novel, in which Dr. Samuel Ferguson crosses Africa from east to west by balloon.'
aliases: Five Weeks in a Balloon: A Journey of Discovery by Three Englishmen in Africa

memes.label: Detective Fix
memes.description: 'The dogged Scotland Yard detective who pursues Phileas Fogg as a suspected bank robber.'

memes.label: Flag Point
memes.description: 'The cape on Godfrey Morgan''s island where the castaway raises his signal flag, watching in vain for rescue.'

memes.label: Florida
memes.description: 'The southern peninsula chosen by the Gun Club as the casting and launch site of the Columbiad in From the Earth to the Moon.'

memes.label: Flotsam Point
memes.description: 'A point on the south-eastern shore of Lincoln Island where the colonists recover a washed-up chest, in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: Fogg Hires Passepartout
memes.description: 'Phileas Fogg engages Jean Passepartout as his manservant on the very morning of the wager.'

memes.label: Formentera
memes.description: 'Smallest of the Balearic Islands; site of the astronomer Palmyrin Rosette''s observatory in Off on a Comet.'

memes.label: Fort Confidence
memes.description: 'The real Hudson''s Bay Company post on Great Bear Lake where Lieutenant Hobson revictuals and gathers intelligence in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: Fort Hope
memes.description: 'The fictional Hudson''s Bay Company fort at Cape Bathurst in The Fur Country, home of Hobson''s expedition and carried off when the peninsula drifts to sea.'

memes.label: Fort Independence
memes.description: 'The Argentine frontier fort on the pampas that the search party makes for in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Fort Kearney
memes.description: 'The real Nebraska railroad garrison where Fogg''s train halts after a Sioux attack, and from which he sets out to rescue Passepartout.'

memes.label: Fort Providence
memes.description: 'The fictional Arctic refuge built by Hatteras'' party in The Adventures of Captain Hatteras, their winter base and the goal of every homeward march.'

memes.label: Fort Reliance
memes.description: 'The Hudson''s Bay Company fort on Great Slave Lake from which Lieutenant Hobson''s expedition sets out in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: Fort Sumter
memes.description: 'The island fortress at the mouth of Charleston Harbor where the American Civil War began, run past by the Dolphin in The Blockade Runners.'

memes.label: The Forward Mutiny
memes.description: 'While Captain Hatteras is away from the icebound brig, his second-in-command leads the crew in revolt, abandoning their captain and destroying the ship by fire.'

memes.label: Frankfort
memes.description: The German fair-city on the Main from which the narrator makes his fateful balloon ascent amid the crowds of the September fair.

memes.label: M. Fridrikssen
memes.description: "The learned professor of natural sciences at Reykjavik who hosts Professor Lidenbrock and recommends the guide Hans for the journey to the earth's centre."

memes.label: From the Earth to the Moon
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which the Baltimore Gun Club casts a giant cannon to fire a manned projectile at the Moon.'

memes.label: Frycollin
memes.description: "Uncle Prudent's timorous valet, swept up with his master into captivity aboard the Albatross, where his incurable cowardice makes him the comic burden of the voyage."

memes.label: Fulgurator
memes.description: 'The self-propelled super-explosive war-engine invented by Thomas Roch, whose secret drives the plot of Facing the Flag.'

memes.label: Gallia
memes.description: 'The fragment of Earth carried off around the sun as a new little planet, the travelling world of Off on a Comet.'

memes.label: Gallian Sea
memes.description: 'The sea covering half the surface of the comet Gallia, carrying the fragment of the Mediterranean off into space in Off on a Comet.'

memes.label: Ganges
memes.description: The sacred river of India, artery of Fogg's crossing by rail and steamboat and a stream of the Hindu dead in Verne's East.

memes.label: Geneva
memes.description: 'The lakeside Swiss city of Master Zacharius, home of the old clockmaker whose watches betray him, set before the town was given over to the dryness of Calvinism.'

memes.label: Germany
memes.description: 'The Central European homeland of Professor Lidenbrock in A Journey to the Center of the Earth, and a recurring byword for learning and skilled craft across Verne''s works.'

memes.label: The Giant Squid Attack
memes.description: 'The battle of the Nautilus crew against giant cuttlefish beneath the sea.'

relations.label: Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea

memes.label: Giant Telescope
memes.description: 'The gigantic reflecting telescope erected on Long''s Peak to observe the Gun Club''s lunar projectile in From the Earth to the Moon.'

relations.label: From the Earth to the Moon

memes.label: Gibraltar
memes.description: 'Rock at the mouth of the Mediterranean, a surviving fragment carried off by the comet Gallia.'

memes.label: Gideon Spilett
memes.description: 'War correspondent of the New York Herald and one of the five castaways of Lincoln Island.'

memes.label: Lord Glenarvan
memes.description: 'The Scottish nobleman and owner of the yacht Duncan who leads the expedition to rescue the shipwrecked Captain Grant.'

memes.label: Go-Ahead
memes.description: 'The giant dirigible aerostat built by the Weldon Institute to vindicate lighter-than-air flight against Robur''s Albatross.'

memes.label: Goat Island
memes.description: 'The wooded island in the Niagara River dividing the American falls from the Canadian, appearing in The Master of the World and Robur the Conqueror.'

memes.label: Gobi
memes.description: 'Great sandy desert of Central Asia crossed by the Grand Transasiatic railway in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent.'

memes.label: Godfrey Morgan
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which a rich young Californian gets his wish for a castaway adventure, never knowing his ordeal has been staged by his uncle.'

memes.label: Gondokoro
memes.description: 'A station on the Nile between the fourth and fifth parallels of north latitude, the northern limit of river exploration in Five Weeks in a Balloon.'

memes.label: Gourbi Island
memes.description: 'The fictional island on the comet Gallia in Off on a Comet, the last inhabited shred of Algeria carried into space and base of the castaways.'

memes.label: Grand Transasiatic Railway Company
memes.description: 'The newly opened railway company running the through line from the Caspian to Peking, along which the whole action of Claudius Bombarnac unfolds.'

memes.label: Granite House
memes.description: 'The cliff-cavern dwelling that the castaways make their home in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: Granite House Lift
memes.description: 'The water-powered lift built by Cyrus Harding to raise the colonists to their cliff-dwelling in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: Gräuben
memes.description: "Professor Lidenbrock's god-daughter and Axel's betrothed, a young Virlandaise mineralogist who blesses the descent to the earth's centre and awaits his return."

memes.label: Great Bear Lake
memes.description: 'The vast subarctic lake of northern Canada, staging ground for Jaspar Hobson''s expedition toward the Arctic coast in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: The Great Eyrie
memes.description: 'The inaccessible crater-crowned mountain in the Blue Ridge that conceals Robur''s secret in Master of the World.'

memes.label: The Investigation of the Great Eyrie
Great Salt Lake
memes.description: 'The real Utah salt lake and Mormon country the Pacific Railroad skirts as Phileas Fogg crosses America.'

memes.label: Great Slave Lake
memes.description: 'The great sub-Arctic Canadian lake from whose shores the Hudson''s Bay expedition of The Fur Country sets out for the polar coast.'

memes.label: Greenland
memes.description: 'Great Arctic island whose ice-bound coasts recur across Verne''s polar voyages as the threshold of the far north.'

memes.label: Guamini
memes.description: 'A river and salt-lake district of the Argentine Pampas, near the Sierra Ventana, sought for water by the expedition in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Gueboroa Island
memes.description: 'The Papuan island in the Torres Strait on which the Nautilus runs aground, and where Ned Land forages ashore, in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea.'

memes.label: Guiana
memes.description: The northern coast of South America, split into French and Dutch Guiana, a longed-for shore for Verne's castaways.

memes.label: Guinea
memes.description: 'West African coastal region and the Gulf that bears its name, a landmark of Vernean African exploration.'

memes.label: Gulf of Mexico
memes.description: 'The warm gulf where the Gulf Stream is born, described at length during the Nautilus voyage in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea.'

memes.label: Gulf Stream
memes.description: 'The real warm-water Atlantic current followed by the Nautilus in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas, a river within the ocean traced by Captain Nemo.'

memes.label: Gun Club
memes.description: 'The Baltimore artillery club that undertakes to fire a projectile to the Moon.'

memes.label: Barbicane's Moon Proposal
memes.description: 'President Barbicane proposes to the Gun Club that they fire a shot at the Moon.'

relations.label: From the Earth to the Moon

memes.label: Gun-Cotton
memes.description: 'Pyroxyle, the nitro-cellulose explosive Verne uses as propellant from the lunar cannon to the castaways of The Mysterious Island.'

relations.label: From the Earth to the Moon

memes.label: Halbrane Land
memes.description: 'The fictional Antarctic land named by the shipwrecked crew of An Antarctic Mystery for their lost schooner, the Halbrane.'

memes.label: Ham Rock
memes.description: 'The isolated reef, named by the castaways of the Chancellor, on which the burning ship grounds before they take to the raft in The Survivors of the Chancellor.'

memes.label: Hamburg
memes.description: 'The old German city where A Journey to the Center of the Earth begins, home of Professor Liedenbrock and the starting point of the descent toward Iceland.'

memes.label: Hans Bjelke
memes.description: "The grave and silent Icelandic eider-down hunter who guides Professor Lidenbrock's descent to the centre of the earth with unshakeable calm."

memes.label: Harris
memes.description: 'The American agent of the slave-trader Alvez who, posing as a friendly guide, lures Dick Sand''s party inland into Angola while pretending it is South America.'

memes.label: Harry Blount
memes.description: "The reserved English correspondent of the Daily Telegraph who reports the Tartar invasion, rival to Alcide Jolivet."

memes.label: Havre
memes.description: The great French port on the Channel, gateway of Atlantic passage and home of many a Verne mariner and passenger.

memes.label: Healthful House
memes.description: 'A private sanitarium on the banks of the Neuse where the inventor Thomas Roch is interned in Facing the Flag.'

memes.label: Hector Servadac
memes.description: "The French staff captain of Algeria who, flung into space aboard the fragment Gallia, leads its castaways on a two-year cometary voyage."

memes.label: Herbert
memes.description: 'The youngest of the five castaways of Lincoln Island, the boy naturalist of the colony.'

memes.label: Hercules
memes.description: 'The giant black companion of the Pilgrim castaways, whose immense strength and devotion repeatedly save his friends.'

memes.label: Himalaya
memes.description: The mightiest mountain range on earth, radiating from the Pamir and crowned by the highest summits on the face of the globe.

memes.label: Holland
memes.description: 'One of the six polar powers bidding for the Arctic regions at the Baltimore auction in Topsy-Turvy.'

memes.label: Hong Kong
memes.description: 'The British colonial port and pivotal waypoint on Phileas Fogg''s route in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

relations.label: Around the World in Eighty Days

memes.label: Miss Horatia Bluett
memes.description: "A thin, dry Englishwoman travelling on the Grand Transasiatic as agent of a London commercial house, whose businesslike courtship of Fulk Ephrinell ends in a marriage transacted like a contract and as swiftly dissolved."

memes.label: Hudson's Bay
memes.description: 'The great inland sea of northern Canada, gateway for the fur-trade expeditions of the north — distinct from the trading company of the same name.'

memes.label: Hudson's Bay Company
memes.description: 'The chartered British fur-trading company whose expedition to found a factory beyond the Arctic Circle drives the plot of The Fur Country.'

memes.label: Ice Bank
memes.description: 'The great southern ice barrier that halts the Nautilus at the limit of the Antarctic seas in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea.'

memes.label: The Drifting Ice-Island
memes.description: 'An Arctic earthquake severs the Cape Bathurst peninsula from the mainland, turning the fur-traders'' settlement into a floating island adrift on the polar sea.'

memes.label: Iceland
memes.description: 'The northern island nation and gateway to the underworld in Journey to the Center of the Earth.'

relations.label: Journey to the Center of the Earth

memes.label: Ichim
memes.description: 'A Western Siberian post-town on the road from Ekaterenburg to Irkutsk, a waypoint for the couriers and correspondents in Michael Strogoff.'

memes.label: Icy Cape
memes.description: 'The Alaskan promontory near which the drifting Victoria Island passes, home to the Esquimaux who aid the castaways in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: Illinois
memes.description: 'Midwestern state of the United States; residence of Dirk Peters at Vandalia and a waypoint of several Vernean journeys.'

memes.label: In Search of the Castaways
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which Lord Glenarvan sails the world along the 37th parallel to rescue the shipwrecked Captain Grant.'

memes.label: In the Year 2889
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne futurist tale following one day in the life of Fritz Napoleon Smith, director of the Earth Chronicle, amid the marvels of the twenty-ninth century.'
aliases: La Journée d''un journaliste américain en 2889
The Day of an American Journalist in 2889

memes.label: India
memes.description: 'The great reversed triangle of British India, crossed by rail in three days on Phileas Fogg''s journey in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

memes.label: Indian Ocean
memes.description: 'The great ocean the Duncan crosses on the 37th parallel in In Search of the Castaways, and a candidate ground for the Britannia wreck.'

memes.label: Inquiry Committee
memes.description: 'The official commission under President John Prestice that interrogated J.T. Maston to uncover the secret of the North Pole cannon.'

memes.label: Iowa
memes.description: 'The prairie state where the survivors of Lincoln Island settle, crossed by the transcontinental railroad in the Vernean novels.'

memes.label: Iquitos
memes.description: 'The Upper Amazon farm-village where the Garral family lives and from which the great raft voyage sets out in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon.'

memes.label: Ireland
memes.description: 'The western island of the British Isles that the Nautilus and the Great Eastern pass on their Atlantic courses in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea.'

memes.label: Irkutsk
memes.description: 'The far capital of Eastern Siberia and the goal of the courier''s mission in Michael Strogoff.'

memes.label: Irtish
memes.description: 'A great river of Western Siberia in Michael Strogoff, running past Omsk and marking the frontier of the Tartar advance.'

memes.label: Isaac Hakkabut
memes.description: 'A miserly, usurious trader from Cologne who owns the tartan Hansa and schemes to hoard all the wealth of the castaways stranded on the comet Gallia.'

memes.label: Island of Ljakow
memes.description: 'The New Siberian island for which the Alaska races in pursuit of Tudor Brown in The Waif of the Cynthia.'

memes.label: Island of Sein
memes.description: 'The rocky island off the Brittany coast, ringed by deadly reefs, on which the Alaska is wrecked in The Waif of the Cynthia.'

memes.label: Isthmus of Panama
memes.description: 'The narrow land bridge joining the Americas and the ocean shortcut between Atlantic and Pacific in Verne''s tales.'

memes.label: Italy
memes.description: 'The Mediterranean peninsula swept away by the comet Gallia, whose survival the survivors hope for in Off on a Comet.'

memes.label: Ivan Ogareff
memes.description: "The disgraced colonel turned traitor who foments the Tartar invasion of Siberia and impersonates Michael Strogoff to betray Irkutsk."

memes.label: J. T. Maston
memes.description: "The Gun Club's zealous perpetual secretary, a maimed artilleryman with a steel-hook hand and gutta-percha skull, whose devotion to Barbicane and love of ordnance drive the moon-shot enterprise."

memes.label: Jacamar Wood
memes.description: 'The forest on the left bank of the Mercy on Lincoln Island, named for the jacamar bird.'

memes.label: James Starr
memes.description: "The retired engineer who managed the Aberfoyle coal-mines for twenty years and, summoned back by Simon Ford's letter, discovers and settles the New Aberfoyle underground city."

memes.label: Jangada
memes.description: 'The enormous timber raft, a floating village, that carries the Garral family down the Amazon in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon.'

memes.label: Japan
memes.description: 'The Pacific empire beyond Hong Kong where Passepartout is stranded and rejoins Fogg, a stage of the circuit in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

memes.label: Joam Garral
memes.description: 'The upright Amazon fazenda owner of Iquitos, secretly the fugitive Joam Dacosta condemned years earlier for a Tijuco crime he never committed, whose voyage down the river becomes a quest to clear his name.'

memes.label: Joe
memes.description: "Dr. Ferguson's devoted and agile servant, the cheerful 'right hand' of the balloon expedition across Africa in Five Weeks in a Balloon."

memes.label: John Mangles
memes.description: "The young captain of the yacht Duncan, whose seamanship carries the expedition through the search for Captain Grant."

memes.label: Johnson
memes.description: 'The steadfast old boatswain of the brig Forward in The Adventures of Captain Hatteras, an Arctic-hardened sailor whose loyalty and skill sustain the polar expedition.'

memes.label: Corporal Joliffe
memes.description: 'The busy, good-humoured corporal and steward of Fort Hope in The Fur Country, who obeys his shrewd wife and revives the half-frozen astronomer.'

memes.label: A Journey to the Center of the Earth
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which Professor Liedenbrock descends an Icelandic volcano toward the center of the earth.'
aliases: Journey to the Center of the Earth
A Journey to the Centre of the Earth

memes.label: Kachgar
memes.description: 'The capital of Chinese Turkestan and the junction of the Russian and Chinese lines of the Grand Transasiatic railway in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent.'

memes.label: Kalumah
memes.description: "The young Esquimaux girl who befriends Mrs Barnett at Fort Hope and braves seventy hours alone at sea to rejoin the drifting colonists."

memes.label: Kamtchatka
memes.description: 'The far-eastern Siberian peninsula whose cold ocean current threatens the drifting ice-island in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: Kamtchatka Current
memes.description: 'The cold Bering ocean current running along the Asian coast, which seized the drifting ice-island and swept it toward the Arctic solitudes in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: Kamtschatka
memes.description: The far-eastern Russian peninsula of volcanoes and the Behring Sea, a remote march of the Muscovite dominion in Verne's Asia.

memes.label: Kazeh
memes.description: 'An important establishment in the interior of Central Africa, a rendezvous for traders and caravans reached by Dr. Ferguson''s balloon in Five Weeks in a Balloon.'

memes.label: Kazounde
memes.description: 'The great inland slave-market town of Angola where the captives are driven and sold in Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen.'

memes.label: Kentucky
memes.description: 'Southern US state, home of the Mammoth Cave, Verne''s recurring benchmark for subterranean grandeur.'

memes.label: Ker Karraje
memes.description: "The Malay pirate who, masked as the wealthy Count d'Artigas, rules the hidden lair of Back Cup and covets Thomas Roch's fulgurator to make himself master of the seas."

memes.label: Kerguelen
memes.description: 'The desolate southern island group where the narrator joins the Halbrane in An Antarctic Mystery.'

memes.label: Ki-Tsang's Attack on the Grand Transasiatic
aliases: The Attack on the Grand Transasiatic

memes.label: Kilimanjaro
memes.description: 'East African mountain into whose flank the Gun Club bores its colossal cannon in Topsy Turvy.'

memes.label: The Firing of the Kilimanjaro Cannon
Kinko
memes.description: "A poor Romanian bound for Pekin, who crosses Asia as a stowaway sealed inside a packing case aboard the Grand Transasiatic, and dies a hero saving the runaway train."

memes.label: Klock-Klock
memes.description: 'Native village in a valley of Tsalal Island where the deadly landslip of An Antarctic Mystery is investigated.'

memes.label: Kolyvan
memes.description: 'A Western Siberian town on the telegraph line between Tomsk and Krasnoiarsk, and the place where Michael Strogoff is captured in Michael Strogoff.'

memes.label: Krasnoiarsk
memes.description: 'Eastern Siberian town on the Yenisei where Michael Strogoff hopes to find fresh transport for Irkutsk.'

memes.label: Labrador
memes.description: 'The bleak sub-Arctic coast of northeastern Canada, a waymark of the northern voyages and namesake of tundra plant and stone.'

memes.label: Lady Helena Glenarvan
memes.description: 'The brave, generous wife of Lord Glenarvan in In Search of the Castaways, whose compassion for Captain Grant''s orphaned children launches the rescue voyage of the Duncan.'

memes.label: Lake Baikal
memes.description: 'The great Siberian lake Michael Strogoff must skirt on his race to Irkutsk, stormy and freezing as winter closes in.'

memes.label: Lake Barnett
memes.description: 'The lake on the drifting Victoria Island, named for Mrs Barnett, whose fate mirrors the doomed colony in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: Lake Erie
memes.description: 'The real Great Lake from whose depths Robur''s machine the Terror rises in The Master of the World, pursued across its waters by the narrator Strock.'

memes.label: Lake Grant
memes.description: 'The tree-framed freshwater lake on the plateau of Lincoln Island, a central landmark of the colonists'' domain in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: Lake Kirdall
memes.description: 'A landlocked Kansas lake where Robur''s submarine Terror is seen darting beneath the water in The Master of the World.'

memes.label: Lake Michigan
memes.description: 'The Great Lake at whose shore the road-race track ends in The Master of the World, where the mysterious machine seems bound for destruction.'

memes.label: Lake Ontario
memes.description: 'Lowest of the Great Lakes, into which the Niagara empties Lake Erie, recurring across Verne''s American scenes.'

memes.label: Lake Superior
memes.description: 'The largest of the Great Lakes, where the mysterious machine of The Master of the World is sighted before vanishing across the continent.'

memes.label: Lake Tanganyika
memes.description: 'The great Central African lake that figures in Dick Sand as a hub of the slave trade and a landmark of Livingstone''s explorations.'

memes.label: Lake Taupo
memes.description: 'The real New Zealand lake in whose mountain-ringed heights the Maori hold Glenarvan''s party captive in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Lake Tchad
memes.description: 'The great Central African lake that Dr. Ferguson''s balloon expedition crosses in Five Weeks in a Balloon.'

memes.label: Lake Tinn
memes.description: 'The long Norwegian lake of the Telemark whose shores frame the journeys and misfortunes of Ticket No. 9672.'

memes.label: Lake Ukereoue
memes.description: 'Verne''s name for the great equatorial African lake, conjectured reservoir of the Nile, sighted from Dr. Ferguson''s balloon in Five Weeks in a Balloon.'

memes.label: Lan-Tcheou
memes.description: 'An important city of western China on the Grand Transasiatic line, a halt in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent where the imperial treasure van is telegraphed to Pekin.'

memes.label: Lancaster Strait
memes.description: 'The real strait off the west coast of Baffin''s Sea, the historic gateway of the Northwest Passage explorers that the Forward enters on its polar course.'

memes.label: Len Guy
memes.description: "The reserved captain of the schooner Halbrane who sails into the Antarctic to rescue his brother William Guy, lost on Tsalal Island."

memes.label: Lena
memes.description: One of the great rivers of eastern Siberia, running north to an Arctic mouth that guided Nordenskiold's Vega and the Tartar march in Verne.

memes.label: Deciphering the Saknussemm Cipher
memes.description: 'Axel accidentally deciphers the runic parchment that reveals the way to the centre of the Earth.'

relations.label: Journey to the Center of the Earth

memes.label: Liedenbrock Sea
memes.description: 'The vast subterranean ocean discovered beneath Iceland in Journey to the Center of the Earth.'

relations.label: Journey to the Center of the Earth

memes.label: Jaspar Hobson
memes.description: "The Hudson's Bay Company lieutenant who leads an expedition to build a polar fort, only to find it adrift on a wandering island of ice."

memes.label: Lima
memes.description: 'Peruvian capital in the valley of the Rimac, the setting of The Pearl of Lima.'

memes.label: The Lima Indian Uprising
aliases: The Rising of the Limanian Indians

memes.label: Lincoln Island
memes.description: 'The volcanic Pacific island where the balloon castaways settle and build their colony in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: The Lincoln Island Landing
memes.description: 'The balloon castaways are hurled by a hurricane onto an unknown Pacific island.'

memes.label: Lisbon
memes.description: The Portuguese capital and Atlantic port, seat of a colonial government implicated in Verne's tale of the slave trade.

memes.label: Liverpool
memes.description: 'English port where Phileas Fogg lands from America, only six hours from the wager he seems to have lost.'

memes.label: Loch Katrine
memes.description: 'The real Scottish loch above the New Aberfoyle colliery in The Underground City, drained when its bed gives way into the mine below.'

memes.label: Loch Malcolm
memes.description: 'The subterranean lake in the depths of New Aberfoyle, on whose banks the mining settlement of Coal Town grows up in The Underground City.'

memes.label: London
memes.description: 'The English capital and home of Phileas Fogg, where his wager begins and must end in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

memes.label: Long's Peak
memes.description: 'A summit of the Rocky Mountains where the Gun Club raised its gigantic reflecting telescope to track the lunar projectile.'

memes.label: Missing the Moon
memes.description: 'A stray asteroid deflects the projectile so that it circles the Moon instead of landing.'

relations.label: From the Earth to the Moon

memes.label: The Projectile
memes.description: 'The hollow aluminium projectile-car in which three travellers are fired to the Moon by the Columbiad in From the Earth to the Moon and Round the Moon.'

memes.label: Lyons
memes.description: The great French silk-city whose looms are a byword for quality and whose fabric forms the very skin of Verne's balloons.

memes.label: Mac-Nab
memes.description: "The Scottish head carpenter of the Fort Hope expedition, whose skilled hands raise the factory's buildings and its final escape-boat in The Fur Country."

memes.label: Madagascar
memes.description: 'The great Indian Ocean island that stands as a terminus of the slave-trade in Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen, supplied from the Mozambique coast.'

memes.label: Madge
memes.description: "Mrs Paulina Barnett's devoted servant and lifelong companion, who shares every hardship of the Fur Country expedition with steadfast faith."

memes.label: Madras
memes.description: 'The great southern Indian city and seat of a British governor, a cornerstone of the East India Company''s dominion.'

memes.label: Madrid
memes.description: The Spanish capital, a discreet telegraphic relay in Verne's plots and a landmark swept by the wandering comet.

memes.label: Major Noltitz
memes.description: "The obliging Russian army surgeon who becomes Claudius Bombarnac's companion and guide across the Grand Transasiatic Railway, sharing his suspicions of the false Faruskiar."

memes.label: Malta
memes.description: The fortified Mediterranean island of the knights and their great cannon, swallowed whole when a fragment of earth breaks away in Off on a Comet.

memes.label: Manaos
memes.description: 'The Brazilian city at the mouth of the Rio Negro, a chief landmark on the Garrals'' raft voyage down the Amazon in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon.'

memes.label: Mandible Cape
memes.description: 'The twin fictional capes, North and South Mandible, that frame the northern jaw of Lincoln Island''s Union Bay in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: Marbre
memes.description: 'One of the two chief hunters of the Fort Hope expedition in The Fur Country, a seasoned trapper who first divines the peril of the drifting island.'

memes.label: Marfa Strogoff
memes.description: "Michael Strogoff's aged mother, who denies knowing her son in public to protect his secret mission across Siberia."

memes.label: Marseilles
memes.description: The great French Mediterranean port, a landfall for Verne's returning voyagers and a byword for the Provençal coast.

memes.label: Martha
memes.description: 'The devoted, timid housekeeper of Professor Lidenbrock''s Königstrasse home in A Journey to the Center of the Earth, whose tattling spreads news of the expedition across the world.'

memes.label: Mary Grant
memes.description: "The daughter of the lost Captain Grant, who joins the Duncan's voyage in search of her shipwrecked father."

memes.label: Maryland
memes.description: 'State of the United States, home to Baltimore and seat of the Gun Club in the Verne cannon novels.'

memes.label: Massachusetts
memes.description: 'New England state; home of Cyrus Smith, and site of the Cambridge observatory in Verne''s astronomical novels.'

memes.label: Master Zacharius
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne fantasy novella in which an aged Geneva clockmaker, believing his life bound to his watches, is destroyed by the pride of science and a diabolical bargain.'
aliases: or the Clockmaker Who Lost His Soul
The Clockmaker Who Lost His Soul

memes.label: Major McNabbs
memes.description: "Lord Glenarvan's imperturbable cousin, a Major who accompanies the Duncan's expedition with unshakeable calm."

memes.label: Mediterranean
memes.description: 'The inland sea whose Algerian shore is torn away by the comet in Off on a Comet, and which the Nautilus also transits in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea.'

memes.label: Melbourne
memes.description: 'Australian port on Port Phillip that anchors the Duncan party''s crossing of the Victorian continent.'

memes.label: Melville Bay
memes.description: 'The real Arctic bay off Baffin''s Sea toward which Hatteras first orders the Forward, the gateway to the far northern channels.'

memes.label: Melville Island
memes.description: 'The Arctic island where Parry wintered in 1819, a recurring landmark of exploration history in The Adventures of Captain Hatteras.'

memes.label: The Mercy
memes.description: 'The chief river of Lincoln Island, named by the castaways in gratitude to Providence.'

memes.label: Merv
memes.description: The Transcaspian oasis city and Grand Transasiatic railway station, four times rebuilt, on the reporter's road to China.

memes.label: Mexico
memes.description: 'The republic south of the United States whose parallel and gulf figure in the Gun Club schemes of From the Earth to the Moon.'

memes.label: Michael Strogoff
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which a courier of the Czar races across Tartar-invaded Siberia to carry a vital letter from Moscow to Irkutsk.'
aliases: Michael Strogoff: The Courier of the Czar

memes.label: Michel Ardan
memes.description: 'The daring French adventurer who volunteers to ride the projectile to the Moon.'

memes.label: Michel Strogoff
memes.description: "The Czar's courier who carries a vital letter across rebel-held Siberia from Moscow to Irkutsk."

memes.label: The Missionary's Rescue
memes.description: 'Dr. Ferguson''s balloon Victoria descends over an African village to snatch a young French missionary from the stake, lifting him to safety just as his captors close in.'
aliases: The Rescue of the French Missionary

memes.label: Mississippi
memes.description: The great river of North America, the "king of rivers" crossed by Verne's travellers on their transcontinental journeys.

memes.label: Mongolia
memes.description: The vast desert land of Central Asia crossed by the Grand Transasiatic, a march of bazaars, brigands and the old wall against China.

memes.label: Mont Blanc
memes.description: 'The highest mountain in Europe, ascended from Chamonix in Verne''s The Ascent of Mont Blanc.'

memes.label: Montgomery Street
memes.description: 'The principal thoroughfare of San Francisco, lined with splendid stores and grand mansions, where the Kolderup family resides in Godfrey Morgan.'

memes.label: Montreal
memes.description: 'The great Canadian city on the St. Lawrence, overflown by the Albatross and once the headquarters of the fur trade in Verne''s tales.'

memes.label: Morganton
memes.description: 'North Carolina town at the foot of the Great Eyrie, base of the narrator''s investigation in The Master of the World.'

memes.label: Morris Island
memes.description: 'The Federal-held island guarding the southern entrance to Charleston Harbor, whose batteries the Dolphin must run in The Blockade Runners.'

memes.label: Moscow
memes.description: 'The old Russian capital where Michael Strogoff opens, the Kremlin city from which the Czar''s courier sets out on his three-thousand-mile race to Irkutsk.'

memes.label: Mount Franklin
memes.description: 'The volcano that dominates Lincoln Island in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: Mount Mendif
memes.description: 'The twin-coned African peak near Yola that the Victoria passes on its balloon crossing in Five Weeks in a Balloon.'

memes.label: Mounts Doerfel
memes.description: 'The lofty lunar mountain range near the Moon''s south pole observed by the travellers in Round the Moon.'

memes.label: Mrs. Weldon
memes.description: "The brave wife of the Pilgrim's owner, whose passage home with her son and Cousin Benedict turns into shipwreck and African captivity, borne with courage and principle."

memes.label: Nadia
memes.description: "The young Livonian who journeys across Siberia at Michael Strogoff's side, posing as his sister and later guiding him when he is blinded."

memes.label: Nantucket
memes.description: 'Island off Massachusetts, celebrated in An Antarctic Mystery as the birthplace of Arthur Gordon Pym.'

memes.label: Nautilus
memes.description: 'Captain Nemo''s electric submarine in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas.'

relations.label: Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea

memes.label: Navy Island
memes.description: 'The island in the Niagara River above the falls, past which the Terror sweeps in The Master of the World.'

memes.label: Neb
memes.description: 'One of the five castaways of Lincoln Island, the faithful servant of the engineer Cyrus Harding.'

memes.label: Nebraska
memes.description: 'The prairie state of the American plains and eastern terminus of the Pacific Railroad in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

memes.label: Ned Land
memes.description: 'The Canadian master harpooner held captive aboard the Nautilus.'

memes.label: Negoro
memes.description: 'The treacherous Portuguese cook of the Pilgrim who sabotages the ship and reveals himself as a slave-trader.'

memes.label: Nell
memes.description: "The mysterious foundling girl born in the depths of New Aberfoyle, granddaughter of the vengeful Silfax, who secretly saves the trapped miners and at last marries Harry Ford."

memes.label: The Death of Captain Nemo
memes.description: 'Captain Nemo dies aboard the Nautilus in the grotto beneath Lincoln Island.'

relations.label: Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea

memes.label: Nemo's Electricity
memes.description: 'Captain Nemo''s self-sufficient sea-derived electrical power that drives the Nautilus in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas.'

memes.label: Nevada
memes.description: 'The silver state of the American Great Basin, crossed by the Pacific Railroad between the Sierra Nevada and the Great Salt Lake in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

memes.label: New Aberfoyle
memes.description: 'The vast subterranean coalfield beneath old Aberfoyle, containing the underground settlement of Coal Town on Loch Malcolm.'

memes.label: New America
memes.description: 'The unknown polar land discovered by the travellers, named New America by the American Altamont.'

memes.label: New Archangel
memes.description: The capital of Russian America, rising on the island of Sitka as head-quarters of the Russian Fur Company.

memes.label: New-Berne
memes.description: 'The North Carolina port on the left bank of the Neuse near Pamlico Sound, off which the schooner Ebba lay while its master carried off the prisoners of Healthful House.'

memes.label: New Georgia
memes.description: 'A sub-Antarctic island of the South Atlantic, a southern waypoint in An Antarctic Mystery.'

memes.label: New Orleans
memes.description: 'The great Southern port at the mouth of the Mississippi, a hub of American commerce and travel in Verne''s tales.'

memes.label: New York
memes.description: The great American Atlantic port and transatlantic gateway, hub of Verne's ocean crossings and inquiries.

memes.label: New Zealand
memes.description: 'Two-island British possession of the South Pacific, Maori land where Glenarvan''s party is imperilled in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Newfoundland
memes.description: 'The great North Atlantic island whose foggy fishing banks and telegraph landfall recur across Verne''s Atlantic voyages.'

memes.label: Niagara Falls
memes.description: 'The great cataract on the Niagara River where the pursuit of the Terror reaches its crisis in The Master of the World.'

memes.label: Niagara River
memes.description: 'The real river draining Lake Erie into Lake Ontario, down whose rapids the Terror flees toward its celebrated falls in The Master of the World.'

memes.label: Nijni-Novgorod
memes.description: 'Russian fair-city on the Volga where Michael Strogoff begins his eastward journey across Siberia.'

memes.label: Nile
memes.description: 'The great African river whose mysterious sources drive the geographic quest of Five Weeks in a Balloon, sought for centuries and never reached from the ground.'

memes.label: Nitroglycerine
memes.description: 'The powerful liquid explosive synthesized by Cyrus Harding on Lincoln Island in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: Norfolk Island
memes.description: 'The South Pacific penal island from which Bob Harvey''s convicts escape to menace the colonists in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: Noroe
memes.description: 'Fishing village on the western coast of Norway near Bergen where the foundling Erik is raised in The Waif of the Cynthia.'

memes.label: North Carolina
memes.description: 'The southern American state, capital Raleigh, whose Alleghany heights hold the Great Eyrie and whose coast borders Pamlico Sound in Master of the World and Facing the Flag.'

memes.label: North Polar Practical Association
memes.description: 'The Baltimore company, a front for the Gun Club, that buys the North Pole at auction in order to exploit the coal buried beneath the polar ice.'

memes.label: The North Pole
memes.description: 'The volcanic island at the geographic North Pole, goal of the expedition in The Adventures of Captain Hatteras.'

memes.label: The Volcano at the Pole
memes.description: 'Hatteras reaches the North Pole and finds it crowned by an active volcano.'

memes.label: North Sea
memes.description: 'Shallow arm of the Atlantic between Britain and the European mainland, recurring across several of Verne''s voyages.'

memes.label: North-West Company
memes.description: 'The Montreal fur-trading company that rivalled the Hudson''s Bay Company until it was absorbed in 1821.'

memes.label: North-West Passage
memes.description: The famous Arctic sea route giving direct communication between the Atlantic and Pacific oceans, undiscovered until McClure won it and a lodestar for the polar voyages of Verne northern tales.

memes.label: Norway
memes.description: 'Scandinavian kingdom of fjords and mountains, principal setting of Ticket No. 9672 and homeland of several Verne seafarers.'

memes.label: Obi
memes.description: 'Great West Siberian river Michael Strogoff must cross near Kolyvan on his road to Irkutsk.'

memes.label: Off on a Comet
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which a comet grazes the Earth and carries Captain Hector Servadac off into space on a fragment named Gallia.'
aliases: To the Sun? / Off on a Comet

memes.label: Ohio
memes.description: 'State of the United States on the southern shore of Lake Erie; the theatre of the pursuit of the Terror in The Master of the World.'

memes.label: Olbinett
memes.description: 'The devoted steward of the yacht Duncan in In Search of the Castaways, whose portable kitchen and unfailing meals sustain Glenarvan''s overland search party.'

memes.label: Omaha
memes.description: 'Nebraska terminus of the Union Pacific where Phileas Fogg boards the transcontinental railroad across America.'

memes.label: Omsk
memes.description: 'The Western Siberian city and military centre that is Michael Strogoff''s home town and an early goal of his journey.'

memes.label: oxyhydric gas
memes.description: 'The illuminating gas Doctor Ox uses as cover for his physiological experiment on the town of Quiquendone.'

memes.label: Pacific Ocean
memes.description: 'The vast ocean whose islands close the search of In Search of the Castaways, where the castaways are finally sought and found.'

memes.label: Pacific Railroad
memes.description: 'The American transcontinental railway that carries Phileas Fogg across the continent in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

memes.label: Paganel
memes.description: 'The absent-minded geographer who joins the search for Captain Grant after boarding the wrong ship.'

memes.label: Palmyrin Rosette
memes.description: "The irascible astronomer aboard the comet Gallia, Hector Servadac's former tutor, who charts the wandering comet's orbit from his makeshift observatory."

memes.label: Pamir
memes.description: 'High plateau of Central Asia, the "Roof of the World," pierced by the Grand Transasiatic railway in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent.'

memes.label: Pamlico Sound
memes.description: 'The real North Carolina sound where the schooner Ebba lies anchored in Facing the Flag, and across which the kidnappers spirit their captive away.'

memes.label: Pan Chao
memes.description: "A young Chinese gentleman educated in Paris, travelling homeward on the Grand Transasiatic with his doctor, whose Parisian wit and modern outlook make him the narrator's favourite companion."

memes.label: Paris
memes.description: The French capital, first Continental stage of Fogg's circuit and a recurring metropolis in Verne's tales.

memes.label: Passepartout
memes.description: 'The good-humoured French valet who accompanies Phileas Fogg around the world.'

memes.label: Patagonia
memes.description: 'Southern region of South America crossed on the 37th parallel in the first phase of the search for Captain Grant.'

memes.label: Paulina Barnett
memes.description: "The celebrated lady traveller and Royal Society laureate who joins Jaspar Hobson's Hudson's Bay expedition to the Arctic and endures the drift of Fort Hope's ice-island."

memes.label: Peak of Teneriffe
memes.description: 'The great volcanic peak of the Canary Islands, sighted from the Duncan early in the voyage of In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Pekin
memes.description: 'The Chinese capital that is the eastern terminus of the Grand Transasiatic railway journey in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent.'

memes.label: Pencroft
memes.description: 'The sailor among the five castaways of Lincoln Island, the practical mainstay and shipbuilder of the colony.'

memes.label: Peninsular and Oriental Company
memes.description: 'The British steamship company whose liners Mongolia and Rangoon carry Phileas Fogg across the eastern legs of his journey in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

memes.label: Pennsylvania
memes.description: 'Mid-Atlantic state; home of the Weldon Institute in Philadelphia in Robur the Conqueror.'

memes.label: Perm
memes.description: 'Russian Ural province and town, the last stage west of the mountains on Michael Strogoff''s road into Siberia.'

memes.label: Persia
memes.description: 'The storied land skirted by the Grand Transasiatic Railway in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent, and the source of the imperial treasure sent from the Shah of Persia to China.'

memes.label: Perth
memes.description: 'The capital of Western Australia and seat of a convict penitentiary from which an escaped band menaces the castaways.'

memes.label: Peru
memes.description: 'The Andean republic from whose forests the Upper Amazon issues and where Joam Dacosta took refuge for years in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon.'

memes.label: Phil Evans
memes.description: "The coolheaded secretary of the Weldon Institute and Uncle Prudent's ballooning rival, carried off aboard Robur's Albatross and forever plotting their escape."
