memes.label: Philadelphia
memes.description: 'The Pennsylvania city home to the Weldon Institute of aeronautics, whose members clash with Robur in Robur the Conqueror.'

memes.label: Phileas Fogg
memes.description: 'The precise English gentleman who wagers he can circle the globe in eighty days.'

relations.label: Around the World in Eighty Days

memes.label: Phina Hollaney
memes.description: "William Kolderup's goddaughter and Godfrey's betrothed, who urges her lover to see the world before their marriage and waits in San Francisco for his return."

memes.label: Platte River
memes.description: 'The Nebraska river whose valley the Pacific Railroad follows across the plains in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

memes.label: Plaza-Mayor
memes.description: The great central square of Lima, the forum of the ancient city of kings, fronted by the viceregal palace and swept by the tumult of the Indian revolt.

memes.label: Pleasant Garden
memes.description: 'The North Carolina village below the Great Eyrie, reached from Morganton along the Catawba River, whose folk were menaced by the mountain in Master of the World.'

memes.label: Polar Sea
memes.description: 'The Arctic Ocean along the northern coast of America, on whose shifting ice Fort Hope is founded and set adrift in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: Popof
memes.description: "The soldierly Russian head guard of the Grand Transasiatic, whose post beside the baggage van and whose gossip make him the narrator's most trusted source aboard the train."

memes.label: Port Balloon
memes.description: 'A sheltered creek on the southern coast of Lincoln Island that the colonists adopt as their natural harbour in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: Port Barnett
memes.description: 'The little harbour at Cape Bathurst founded by the Hudson''s Bay expedition in The Fur Country, named for Mrs Paulina Barnett and lost when the cape drifts out to sea.'

memes.label: Port Egmont
memes.description: 'The real Falklands harbour where the schooner Halbrane provisions and enlists the enigmatic Hunt before sailing for the Antarctic in An Antarctic Mystery.'

memes.label: Port Gräuben
memes.description: 'The creek on the shore of the underground Liedenbrock Sea, named by Professor Liedenbrock as the launch point of the raft voyage in Journey to the Centre of the Earth.'

memes.label: Portugal
memes.description: 'The old colonial kingdom whose empire — reaching Brazil, Angola, and the Azores — shadows Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon and other Verne voyages.'

memes.label: Professor Lidenbrock
memes.description: 'The impetuous German professor who leads the descent to the centre of the earth.'

relations.label: Journey to the Center of the Earth

memes.label: Prospect Heights
memes.description: 'The high granite plateau above the Chimneys on Lincoln Island, home to Granite House and the colonists'' gardens.'

memes.label: Prussia
memes.description: The North German kingdom and great power, a workshop of industry and a party to the wars and treaties of Verne's Europe.

memes.label: Quebec
memes.description: 'The old French-founded Canadian city on the St. Lawrence, hometown of the harpooner Ned Land.'

memes.label: Quiquendone
memes.description: 'A tiny, phlegmatic Flemish town, absent from every map, where Doctor Ox conducts his gas experiment.'

memes.label: Rae
memes.description: 'The skilful blacksmith of the Fort Hope expedition in The Fur Country, who forges the fort''s ironwork and volunteers among the bravest against the marauding bears.'

memes.label: Raleigh
memes.description: The capital of North Carolina, an important inland town about one hundred and fifty miles within the province, reached by Strock in his pursuit of the Great Eyrie mystery.

memes.label: Red Creek
memes.description: 'The fictional watercourse on Lincoln Island in The Mysterious Island, named for the colour of its waters and feeding the island''s great lake.'

memes.label: Red Sea
memes.description: 'The real sea between Africa and Arabia crossed by the Nautilus in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas, entered through Bab el Mandeb.'

memes.label: Reform Club
memes.description: 'The Pall Mall gentlemen''s club where Phileas Fogg makes and settles his wager to circle the globe in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

relations.label: Around the World in Eighty Days

memes.label: Reptile End
memes.description: 'The south-western cape of Lincoln Island, marking one extremity of the settlers'' explored shore.'

memes.label: The Return of Ole Kamp
aliases: The Reunion of Ole and Hulda
The Rescue of the Viking's Mate

memes.label: The Return to Earth by Balloon
Rhine
memes.description: The great river of the German lands, a natural frontier and a river of legend in Verne, seen as an unrolled ribbon from the aeronaut's car.

memes.label: Richmond
memes.description: 'The Confederate capital of Virginia besieged by Grant, the prison-city from which the castaways of Lincoln Island escape by balloon.'

memes.label: Riga
memes.description: The Livonian city on the Baltic, home of Nadia Fedor before the long road into Siberian exile toward Irkutsk.

memes.label: Rio Colorado
memes.description: 'A Patagonian river crossing the thirty-seventh parallel, sister to the Rio Negro, searched by the expedition in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Rio de Janeiro
memes.description: 'The Brazilian capital and seat of justice on the Atlantic, whose distant authority governs the fate of the Amazon travellers.'

memes.label: Rio de la Plata
memes.description: The wide South American estuary of the River Plate, giving its name to the provinces of La Plata, passed by the Nautilus off Uruguay.

memes.label: Rio Negro
memes.description: 'The greatest black-water tributary of the Amazon, joining the main river at Manaos in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon.'

memes.label: Robert Curtis
memes.description: 'The second mate of the Chancellor who takes command as the ship burns and founders, leading the survivors on their raft through fire, storm, mutiny, and starvation to rescue near the Amazon.'

memes.label: Robert Grant
memes.description: "The brave young son of Captain Grant, who joins the search for his lost father across the 37th parallel."

memes.label: Robur
memes.description: 'The defiant aeronautical genius who proclaims mastery of the air across two novels.'

memes.label: Robur the Conqueror
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which the inventor Robur challenges the balloonists of the Weldon Institute with his heavier-than-air flying machine.'

memes.label: Rocky Mountains
memes.description: 'The great North American range crowned by the Long''s Peak observatory, from which the Gun Club tracks the lunar projectile across Verne''s moon novels.'

memes.label: Round the Moon
memes.description: 'Jules Verne''s sequel to From the Earth to the Moon, following three travellers sealed in a projectile as it circles the Moon and returns to Earth.'

relations.label: From the Earth to the Moon

memes.label: Royal Geographical Society
memes.description: 'The London learned society that funds and honours the exploratory expeditions of Verne''s adventurers, from Ferguson''s balloon voyage to Hatteras''s polar journey.'

memes.label: Royal Institution
memes.description: 'The Edinburgh learned society of which engineer James Starr is a leading member.'

memes.label: Royal Society
memes.description: 'The premier London learned society whose members and laureates figure across several of the Voyages.'

memes.label: Ruhmkorff Apparatus
memes.description: 'The portable electric induction lamp carried by the explorers in A Journey to the Centre of the Earth for safe underground light.'

relations.label: A Journey to the Centre of the Earth

memes.label: Russia
memes.description: 'The vast empire whose Siberian provinces the Czar''s courier crosses to reach besieged Irkutsk in Michael Strogoff.'

memes.label: Sabine
memes.description: "One of the two chief hunters of the Fort Hope expedition in The Fur Country, an expert marksman known for his dry, sententious wit."

memes.label: Sacramento
memes.description: 'California capital and river, western reach of the Pacific Railroad in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

memes.label: Sahara
memes.description: 'The vast African desert the balloon must cross in Five Weeks in a Balloon, a nine-hundred-mile expanse of solitudes where caravans may go weeks without water.'

memes.label: Saint Paul de Loanda
memes.description: 'The capital of the Portuguese colony on the west coast of Africa, a coastal goal of trans-continental journeys in Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen.'

memes.label: Saint-Pierre-Miquelon
memes.description: The French island station from which the schooner Viking set sail, its departure fixing the last certain moment before an ill-fated voyage was lost.

memes.label: Arne Saknussemm
memes.description: "The sixteenth-century Icelandic alchemist whose runic cryptogram reveals the route to the earth's centre, the precursor whose trail Lidenbrock and Axel follow."

memes.label: Salt Lake City
memes.description: 'The Mormon capital of Utah beside the Great Salt Lake, a striking waymark on the transcontinental railway.'

memes.label: Samarkand
memes.description: 'Ancient Central Asian city on the Grand Transasiatic railway, a principal stop on the narrator''s journey in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent.'

memes.label: Samuel Ferguson
memes.description: "The learned explorer and commander of the Victoria, who conceives and leads the balloon crossing of Africa in Five Weeks in a Balloon."

memes.label: San Francisco
memes.description: 'The Californian port where Phileas Fogg lands in America and begins his rail crossing of the continent in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

memes.label: Sandwich Islands
memes.description: 'The far-southern isles, discovered by Cook, that the Halbrane takes as her point of departure toward the pole in An Antarctic Mystery.'

memes.label: Sangarre
memes.description: "The Tsigane spy and devoted accomplice of Ivan Ogareff, whose watchfulness unmasks Michael Strogoff."

memes.label: Sardinia
memes.description: The great Mediterranean island south of Corsica, its barren rocks swept away in the comet's passage.

memes.label: Sargasso Sea
memes.description: 'The weed-choked Atlantic region the Nautilus crosses in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas.'

relations.label: Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea

memes.label: Saville Row
memes.description: 'The London street in Burlington Gardens where the methodical Phileas Fogg kept his house at No. 7, the starting point of his wager journey around the world.'

memes.label: Scotland
memes.description: 'The Highland homeland of Lord Glenarvan, from which the Duncan sets out to search the thirty-seventh parallel in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: The Sea Monster Hunt
memes.description: 'The frigate Abraham Lincoln sets out to hunt the mysterious sea monster that proves to be the Nautilus.'

relations.label: Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea

memes.label: Sea of Clouds
memes.description: 'The lunar plain Mare Nubium on the Moon''s western side, surveyed by the projectile''s travellers in Round the Moon.'

memes.label: Sea of Rains
memes.description: 'The lunar plain Mare Imbrium, ringed by the Apennines and Carpathians, over which the projectile passes in Round the Moon.'

memes.label: Semipolatinsk
memes.description: 'A Siberian government and town on the Irtish, overrun during the Tartar invasion in Michael Strogoff.'

memes.label: Senegal
memes.description: 'The West African region and French colony that forms the western goal of Dr. Ferguson balloon crossing in Five Weeks in a Balloon.'

memes.label: Sergeant Long
memes.description: "The steadfast sergeant of the Company's expedition to the far north, a model soldier and Lieutenant Hobson's most trusted second."

memes.label: Serpentine Peninsula
memes.description: 'The wooded south-western peninsula of Lincoln Island, ending in the Reptile End promontory, in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: Richard Shandon
memes.description: 'The first mate and provisional commander of the brig Forward in The Adventures of Captain Hatteras, who recruits the crew for an unknown captain he vainly hopes to become.'

memes.label: Shanghai
memes.description: 'Chinese port from which the American mail steamer departs, forcing Phileas Fogg''s desperate dash up the coast to catch it.'

memes.label: Shannon Island
memes.description: 'The Arctic island north of Gaël-Hamkes Bay toward which the search of A Winter Amid the Ice is directed.'

memes.label: Shark Gulf
memes.description: 'The jaw-shaped gulf at the south-eastern extremity of Lincoln Island, walled by lava cliffs, in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: Ship's Compass
memes.description: 'The marine compass aboard the Pilgrim, whose sabotage by Negoro sends the ship off course in Dick Sand, A Captain at Fifteen.'

memes.label: Siberia
memes.description: 'The vast Asiatic Russian land across which Michael Strogoff carries the Tsar''s message from Moscow to Irkutsk.'

memes.label: Sicily
memes.description: The great Mediterranean island crowned by Etna, marking an ancient land-bridge beneath the sea, torn from the map in Off on a Comet.

memes.label: Sierra Tandil
memes.description: 'A mountain range of the Argentine pampas rising a thousand feet above the sea, a landmark on the trans-Patagonian search in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Silfax's Firedamp Attack
aliases: The Firedamp Attack on New Aberfoyle

memes.label: Simon Hart
memes.description: "The French engineer who, disguised as the warder Gaydon, guards the inventor Thomas Roch and narrates the pursuit of Ker Karraje's pirates from within their stronghold."

memes.label: Singapore
memes.description: 'Coaling port on the Rangoon''s route where Fix wires ahead to Hong Kong on the trail of Phileas Fogg.'

memes.label: Sir Francis Trevellyan
memes.description: "A haughty, perpetually silent English gentleman aboard the Grand Transasiatic, who expresses his contempt for the Russian railway enterprise through shrugs and sneers and never speaks a word the whole journey."

memes.label: Smith's Straits
memes.description: 'The high Arctic passage, route of the American explorer Kane, that Shandon is ordered to attempt in the opening voyage of The Adventures of Captain Hatteras.'

memes.label: The Snæfellsjökull Descent
memes.description: 'The explorers plunge into the crater of Snæfellsjökull to begin their journey underground.'

relations.label: Journey to the Center of the Earth

memes.label: Snæfellsjökull
memes.description: 'The Icelandic glacier-volcano whose crater is the gateway to the interior of the Earth in Journey to the Center of the Earth.'

relations.label: Journey to the Center of the Earth

memes.label: Snowy River
memes.description: 'The flood-swollen Australian river that bars the searchers'' final approach to Twofold Bay in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Sou-Tcheou
memes.description: 'A walled Chinese city on the Grand Transasiatic line, marked in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent as the western end of the Great Wall of China.'

memes.label: Soudan
memes.description: 'Historic region of central Africa crossed by the balloon Victoria and a recurring frontier of Vernean exploration.'

memes.label: South America
memes.description: 'The southern continent of the New World, a recurring stage across Verne''s voyages from Patagonia to the Amazon.'

memes.label: South Pole
memes.description: 'The southernmost point of the earth, reached and claimed by Captain Nemo in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea.'

memes.label: The South Pole Attained
memes.description: 'Captain Nemo drives the Nautilus beneath the Antarctic ice to reach the geographic South Pole and plant his flag on 21 March 1868.'

relations.label: Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea

memes.label: Spain
memes.description: 'The Iberian kingdom from whose coast the comet Gallia carries off a band of Spaniards in Off on a Comet.'

memes.label: Spencer Island
memes.description: 'The fictional Pacific island where Godfrey Morgan is marooned; bought by the millionaire Kolderup, it is renamed Phina Island by its unwitting castaway.'

memes.label: Spitzbergen
memes.description: 'The high-Arctic archipelago north of Norway, a gateway and waymark for Verne''s polar expeditions.'

memes.label: St Louis Fur Company
memes.description: 'The American fur-trading company that is the sole remaining rival of the Hudson''s Bay Company in the far north.'

memes.label: Stapi
memes.description: 'An Icelandic village at the foot of Snæfell, the last staging point before the descent into the volcano.'

memes.label: Stockholm
memes.description: 'The Swedish capital and home of Dr. Schwaryencrona, where the foundling Erik is raised and educated in The Waif of the Cynthia.'

memes.label: Stony Hill
memes.description: 'The barren Florida hill where the Gun Club casts and buries its giant Columbiad cannon in From the Earth to the Moon.'

memes.label: Strait of Gibraltar
memes.description: 'The narrow passage between the Mediterranean and the Atlantic through which the Nautilus races in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea.'

memes.label: Strait of Magellan
memes.description: 'The southern passage between the Atlantic and Pacific through which the Duncan sails on her search in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: The Blinding of Michael Strogoff
memes.description: 'Condemned as a spy by the Tartar Emir, the Tsar''s courier is sentenced to be blinded by a white-hot blade passed before his eyes at Tomsk.'

memes.label: Stromboli
memes.description: 'The Italian volcano through whose crater the explorers are expelled at the end of Journey to the Center of the Earth.'

relations.label: Journey to the Center of the Earth

memes.label: The Stromboli Eruption
memes.description: 'The explorers are hurled back to the surface by a volcanic eruption at Stromboli.'

relations.label: Journey to the Center of the Earth

memes.label: Suez
memes.description: 'Egyptian canal town where detective Fix first waits to intercept Phileas Fogg on the road to India.'

memes.label: Sullivan Island
memes.description: 'The Confederate-held island on the north side of Charleston Harbor, whose channel the Dolphin uses to slip the blockade in The Blockade Runners.'

memes.label: The Survivors of the Chancellor
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel told as the journal of a passenger aboard the burning ship Chancellor and the raft of its starving survivors.'

memes.label: Sweden
memes.description: 'The Scandinavian homeland tied to Erik Hersebom and to the Nordenskiold arctic expedition in The Waif of the Cynthia.'

memes.label: Switzerland
memes.description: 'The Alpine land of Master Zacharius, famed across Verne''s works for its clockmakers, mountains, and glaciers.'

memes.label: Sydney
memes.description: 'The great port of New South Wales and former capital of the eastern Australian colony, a hub of the castaways'' wanderings.'

memes.label: Tabatinga
memes.description: 'The first Brazilian town on the Amazon at the Peruvian frontier, a frontier post reached by the jangada in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon.'

memes.label: Tabor Island
memes.description: 'A small desert island in the South Pacific where the outlaw Ayrton was marooned, discovered by the Lincoln Island colonists.'

memes.label: The Tabor Island Castaway
memes.description: 'The colonists find a man on Tabor Island reduced by solitude to a savage state.'

memes.label: Tachkend
memes.description: 'A great city of Russian Turkestan on the Grand Transasiatic railway, a two-and-a-half-hour halt on the reporter''s journey in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent.'

memes.label: Tadorn Marsh
memes.description: 'A vast marsh in the south-eastern part of Lincoln Island, a haunt of waterfowl and game.'

memes.label: Tai-Youan
memes.description: 'A station city of northern China on the Grand Transasiatic line, the depot from which a relief engine is summoned in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent.'

memes.label: Tampa Town
memes.description: 'The South Florida town chosen by the Gun Club as the launch site for its lunar projectile in From the Earth to the Moon.'

relations.label: From the Earth to the Moon

memes.label: Tartlet
memes.description: "The pompous dancing and deportment master engaged as Godfrey Morgan's travelling companion, a timorous bachelor whose sea-sickness and terrors undo his professorial poise once shipwrecked on a desert island."

memes.label: J. R. Taskinar
memes.description: "A wealthy magnate of Stockton and William Kolderup's bitter rival, who is outbid for Spencer Island at auction and later seeks revenge."

memes.label: Tasmania
memes.description: 'The English island south of Australia, a southern waymark of the whaling grounds and a byword for the convict colonies.'

memes.label: Teheran
memes.description: The Persian capital beneath the snows of the Elburz, a byword for the fabrics of the East and a terminus of the great Asian railways.

memes.label: Texas
memes.description: 'The vast southern Union state that vied with Florida to host the Gun Club Columbiad in From the Earth to the Moon.'

memes.label: Thalcave
memes.description: "The Patagonian guide who leads Glenarvan's party across the pampas in search of Captain Grant."

memes.label: Thames
memes.description: The great river of London, crowded with barges and steamboats, down which the Resolute sailed toward the sea in Verne.

memes.label: The Adventures of Captain Hatteras
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel following the obsessive Captain Hatteras on his quest to reach the North Pole.'

memes.label: The Ascent of Mont Blanc
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne first-person narrative recounting a perilous 1871 ascent of Mont Blanc from Chamonix, across glaciers, ice-walls, and avalanches to the summit and back.'

memes.label: The Blockade Runners
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novella in which a Glasgow captain runs the Union blockade of Charleston for cotton profit and stays to rescue an imprisoned abolitionist and his daughter.'

memes.label: The Chimneys
memes.description: 'The castaways'' first shelter on Lincoln Island: a natural pile of granite rocks at the mouth of the Mercy.'

memes.label: The Forward
memes.description: 'The ice-armoured brig built for Captain Hatteras''s secret voyage to the North Pole in The Adventures of Captain Hatteras.'

memes.label: The Fur Country
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which a Hudson Bay fur outpost at Cape Bathurst is set adrift when the ground beneath it proves to be floating ice.'
aliases: The Fur Country: Seventy Degrees North Latitude

memes.label: The Master of the World
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which a federal inspector pursues Robur and his all-terrain machine the Terror, whose inventor proclaims himself master of the world.'

memes.label: The Moon
memes.description: 'Earth''s satellite and the destination of the Gun Club''s projectile across From the Earth to the Moon and Round the Moon.'

relations.label: From the Earth to the Moon

memes.label: The Mysterious Island
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which five castaways build a colony on an uncharted Pacific island.'

memes.label: The Pearl of Lima
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novella of Lima in which an Indian mountaineer loves a Jewish merchant''s daughter who proves to be a lost Spanish nobleman''s child, ending in tragedy at a river cataract.'
aliases: The Pearl of Lima: A Story of True Love

memes.label: the Sword
memes.description: 'The small British submersible torpedo-boat sent into Back Cup lagoon to rescue Thomas Roch in Facing the Flag.'

memes.label: The Terror
memes.description: 'Robur''s four-mode machine in Master of the World, able to travel as automobile, boat, submarine, and aircraft.'

memes.label: The Underground City
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel set in the Scottish coal mines, in which the discovery of a new seam opens an underground world haunted by a vengeful old miner.'

memes.label: The Waif of the Cynthia
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel (with André Laurie) about a Norwegian foundling who seeks the truth of his birth, set adrift as an infant tied to a buoy from the ship Cynthia.'

memes.label: Thomas Black
memes.description: "A Greenwich astronomer who joins the Fur Country expedition to observe a total solar eclipse, indifferent to every peril but his one scientific mission."

memes.label: Thomas Roch
memes.description: "The French inventor of genius, half-maddened and abducted for his devastating Fulgurator, whose last spark of patriotism redeems him."

memes.label: Tibet
memes.description: 'The high frontier land of table-lands and glacier-fed torrents skirted by the Grand Transasiatic Railway in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent and overflown by Robur''s Albatross.'

memes.label: Ticket No. 9672
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel set in Norway, in which a shipwrecked sailor''s farewell message — a lottery ticket sealed in a bottle — becomes his betrothed''s treasure.'

memes.label: Tiflis
memes.description: The Transcaucasian city of Georgia, junction of three railways and the starting point of the reporter's journey across Asia.

memes.label: Tijuco
memes.description: 'Brazilian diamond-district town where the crime that shadows Joam Dacosta was committed.'

memes.label: Timbuctoo
memes.description: 'The fabled desert city on the Niger, the storied "Queen of the Desert" overflown by the balloonists in Five Weeks in a Balloon.'

memes.label: Tjon
memes.description: 'Deep Chinese valley spanned by an unfinished viaduct on the Grand Transasiatic, setting of the climax of The Adventures of a Special Correspondent.'

memes.label: Tobolsk
memes.description: 'A government of Western Siberia and one of its chief towns, whose loyal Cossacks march to resist the Tartar invasion in Michael Strogoff.'

memes.label: Tom Turner
memes.description: "The mate and boatswain of Robur's aeronef Albatross, an iron-framed Englishman who mans the helm, sounds the great trumpet, and works the ship's guns through every peril of the aerial voyage."

memes.label: Tomsk
memes.description: 'The large Western Siberian city on the telegraph line whose fall marks the Tartar advance in Michael Strogoff.'

memes.label: Top
memes.description: 'The faithful dog of engineer Cyrus Harding on Lincoln Island.'

memes.label: Topsy-Turvy
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel in which the Gun Club buys the Arctic and schemes to tilt the Earth''s axis with a giant cannon to mine the coal beneath the polar ice.'
aliases: The Purchase of the North Pole

memes.label: Torres Strait
memes.description: 'The real reef-choked strait between Australia and New Guinea where the Nautilus runs aground in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas.'

memes.label: Tripoli
memes.description: 'City and coast of North Africa, the northern gateway to the Sahara in Five Weeks in a Balloon.'

memes.label: 'Tristan d''Acunha'
memes.description: 'A lonely volcanic island of the South Atlantic, the last inhabited call of the Halbrane before the Antarctic ice in An Antarctic Mystery.'

memes.label: Tsalal Island
memes.description: 'The fictional Antarctic island at the heart of An Antarctic Mystery, taken from Poe''s Arthur Gordon Pym and the goal of the schooner Halbrane''s voyage.'

memes.label: Tudor Brown
memes.description: "The sinister and enigmatic villain of The Waif of the Cynthia, who schemes to keep Erik from his origins and dies in the Arctic by the same violence he deals out."

memes.label: Tunis
memes.description: 'City and region of the North African coast; its bay is carried off by the comet Gallia in Off on a Comet.'

memes.label: Turkestan
memes.description: 'The Central Asian province of Asiatic Russia that the Grand Transasiatic Railway traverses in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent, the chief commercial route between Europe and the Celestial Empire.'

memes.label: Turkey
memes.description: 'The Ottoman realm that recurs across Verne''s voyages, from the Nautilus off rebellious Crete to the inquiry into the great sea-monster.'

memes.label: Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea
memes.description: 'A Jules Verne novel following Professor Aronnax aboard Captain Nemo''s submarine Nautilus.'

memes.label: Twofold Bay
memes.description: 'The Australian bay on the 37th parallel that is the goal of the overland search in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Uncle Prudent
memes.description: "The wealthy and hot-tempered president of the Weldon Institute, a champion of lighter-than-air flight who is carried off by Robur and schemes throughout to escape the Albatross."

memes.label: Union Bay
memes.description: 'The wide bay on the eastern coast of Lincoln Island, fronting Granite House and Prospect Heights in The Mysterious Island.'

memes.label: United States
memes.description: The transcontinental North American republic, home of the Gun Club and a recurring stage for Vernean voyages.

memes.label: Upper Amazon
memes.description: 'The upper basin of the Amazon in Peru and Brazil, cradle of Iquitos and the Garral fazenda in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon.'

memes.label: Ural Mountains
memes.description: 'The real mountain range dividing Europe from Asia, crossed by the courier Michael Strogoff on his journey into Siberia in Michael Strogoff.'

memes.label: Utah
memes.description: 'The Mormon territory of the Great Salt Lake crossed by the transcontinental railroad in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

memes.label: Uzun Ada
memes.description: 'The Caspian port on the eastern shore where the Grand Transasiatic railway begins, first Asian foothold of the reporter Bombarnac in The Adventures of a Special Correspondent.'

memes.label: Valparaiso
memes.description: 'The Chilean port that is the Pilgrim''s intended destination in Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen, the landfall the castaways never reach.'

memes.label: Vancouver Island
memes.description: 'The large island off the Pacific coast of North America, home port of the mysterious yacht in Verne''s tales.'

memes.label: Vanikoro
memes.description: 'A Pacific island of reefs where the La Pérouse expedition was lost, visited by the Nautilus.'

memes.label: Vesfjorddal
memes.description: 'Narrow wooded valley of the Telemark along the Maan below the Rjukan falls, the scenic heart of Ticket No. 9672.'

memes.label: Victoria (balloon)
memes.description: 'Dr. Ferguson''s double-envelope hydrogen balloon that crosses Africa in Five Weeks in a Balloon.'

memes.label: Victoria Bay
memes.description: 'The fictional Arctic bay of New America, named by Hatteras''s party and lying on the route between Cape Washington and Fort Providence.'

memes.label: Victoria Island
memes.description: 'The giant drifting island of ice that carries Fort Hope out to sea after breaking away from Cape Bathurst.'

memes.label: Vienna
memes.description: The Austrian capital, a seat of science and a waypoint on the Continental journeys of Verne's travellers.

memes.label: Vigo Bay
memes.description: 'The bay on Spain''s northwest coast where sunken Spanish galleons lie, and where Captain Nemo harvests gold from the seabed in Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea.'

memes.label: Villa Rica
memes.description: 'The Brazilian mining town whose assizes condemned Joam Dacosta for the diamond convoy robbery, and from whose prison he escaped in Eight Hundred Leagues on the Amazon.'

memes.label: Volga
memes.description: 'Great Russian river Michael Strogoff follows and crosses at Nijni-Novgorod at the outset of his ride to Irkutsk.'

memes.label: The Rescue of the Waif of the Cynthia
'Walruses'' Bay'
memes.description: 'The fictional Arctic bay named by Hobson''s party near Cape Bathurst, its shore marked by volcanic cliffs later reshaped by earthquake in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: Washburn Bay
memes.description: 'A bay on the northern Canadian coast surveyed by Jaspar Hobson''s expedition in The Fur Country.'

memes.label: Washington
memes.description: 'The capital of the United States, seat of government and the American prime meridian in Verne''s tales.'

memes.label: Washington Bay
memes.description: 'The fictional bay on the southern shore of Lincoln Island, named by the colonists and bounded by Claw Cape and Reptile End.'

memes.label: Weldon Institute
memes.description: 'The Philadelphia ballooning club whose lighter-than-air convictions are challenged by Robur and his flying machine the Albatross.'

memes.label: Wellington Channel
memes.description: 'The real Arctic channel between North Devon and Cornwallis Island, one of the routes by which Hatteras seeks the open polar sea.'

memes.label: The Whale Hunt Disaster
memes.description: 'Captain Hull and the whole crew of the Pilgrim perish in a single boat while hunting a jubarte whale, leaving the ship in the hands of the fifteen-year-old Dick Sand.'

relations.label: Dick Sand: A Captain at Fifteen

memes.label: William Guy
memes.description: "The captain of the schooner Jane and brother of Len Guy, marooned for eleven years beyond Tsalal Island and the object of the Halbrane's Antarctic rescue."

memes.label: William W. Kolderup
memes.description: "The immensely rich San Francisco nabob who is Godfrey's uncle and guardian, and who secretly stages his nephew's desert-island ordeal to teach him a lesson."

memes.label: Wimerra
memes.description: 'A river and district of the Province of Victoria, crossed by the expedition in In Search of the Castaways.'

memes.label: Wisconsin
memes.description: 'The northern state whose roads host the great automobile race of The Master of the World.'

memes.label: Yakutsk
memes.description: 'Easternmost of the great governments of Asiatic Russia, whose relief column marches on Irkutsk in Michael Strogoff.'

memes.label: Yenisei
memes.description: 'Broad Eastern Siberian river below Krasnoiarsk that forms a major barrier on the road to Irkutsk.'

memes.label: Yokohama
memes.description: 'The principal Japanese port where Phileas Fogg lands and re-embarks on his circuit of the globe in Around the World in Eighty Days.'

memes.label: Zabediero
memes.description: 'Siberian village on the Tom near Tomsk where Ivan Ogareff makes his forward camp and Michael Strogoff is taken prisoner.'

memes.label: Zanzibar
memes.description: 'The East African island and port from which Dr. Ferguson launches his balloon voyage across the continent in Five Weeks in a Balloon.'

memes.label: Zinca Klork
memes.description: "A pretty young Roumanian settled in Peking, the betrothed of the stowaway Kinko, who waits in anguish for the packing-case that carries her lover across Asia and is at last reunited with and married to him."
